name: floats-137: onclick stops animation and sets test class
description: Page starts with a toggle animation (body.className alternates between 'a' and 'b' every 500ms). Clicking the Examine button calls clearTimeout(timer) and sets body.className='test', freezing the display.

events.message: Step 1: Click the Examine button to stop animation
Step 2: Verify body class is now 'test' (animation stopped)
